mapper.select: SELECT u.username, o.order_no, o.total FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE u.active = true
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, email, active) VALUES (#{username}, #{email}, #{active})
mapper.select: SELECT u.username, r.role_name FROM users u INNER JOIN user_roles ur ON u.id = ur.user_id INNER JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.id
